response.justification: Bogdan has over 15 years of solid full-stack and cloud engineering experience, including entrepreneurial success as a founder, which aligns well with several preferred qualifications. However, while he has some recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure, he lacks the deep, recognized AI expertise, advanced AI degree, and Director-level strategic consulting background heavily emphasized for this AI Strategy role.
strengths: Exceeds the minimum requirement of 15 years of software engineering experience.
Brings valuable entrepreneurial experience as the founder of the GISCollective open-source platform.
Possesses hands-on cloud experience (AWS, Kubernetes) and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP.
concerns: Lacks the preferred Master's or PhD in an AI-related field and recognized industry expertise in AI.
Most roles have been at the Senior or Staff level, which may fall short of the Director-level expectations for this Principal role.
Limited demonstrated experience advising strategic enterprise customers on cutting-edge AI adoption and transformation.
